name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Oligarchy or democracy?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Friends,
Tonight, Senators Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren hosted a town-hall to get people fired up about resisting the rise of oligarchy in America and the decline of the middle class.
Although the issue of wealth and income inequality is the great moral issue of our time, it has not been given the coverage it deserves by the mainstream media. Senators Sanders and Warren explained that inequality is at a record high because our economy and our democracy are increasingly owned by a tiny few.
**At a time when most working families are struggling and the oligarchs are consolidating control, we must fight harder than ever for a government that works for all of us, not only the 1 percent.**
Just 10 years after the 2008 financial crisis destroyed communities across the country and millions of people lost their jobs, the big banks and their political cronies are back with a bill that would undermine the rules designed to prevent another crisis.
The 14 Democrats in the Senate who voted to pass this bill need to know we won't let them get away with doing Wall Street's bidding any longer. When power is concentrated with only a few, we need Democrats to stand up for the many.
[**Tell Congress: stand with working people against Wall Street and the #BankLobbyistAct.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac45/bed43eb/5e0d23f0/75fe3ad4/774976198/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/stand-up-to-oligarch-stop-the-bank-lobbyist-act?source=em180319")
**The #BankLobbyistAct threatens all Americans by making another 2008 style financial crisis more likely.** The bill would raise the limit on which banks are subjected to the strictest rules from $50 billion to $250 billion. If the bill passes, 25 of the largest 40 banks in the country would face the same rules as local community banks--including big banks like BB&T, SunTrust, and the American outposts of foreign giants like Deutsche Bank, BNP Paribas, and Banco Santander. These banks got nearly $50 billion in taxpayer bailouts after the 2008 financial crisis--and they're back to making record profits.
**This bill would make it easier for banks to discriminate against people of color, women, and queer people who need a mortgage.** The #BankLobbyistAct would exempt an estimated 85 percent of all U.S. banks and credit unions from public reporting who they give mortgages to--which would make it much easier for them to get away with discrimination.
**To add insult to injury, the bill will ban consumers from filing lawsuits against credit reporting agencies like Equifax.** The banks and the credit reporting agencies are still trying to undermine the rules that keep them in line, even after they were found to have committed fraud and systemic misconduct.
[**That's why we need to tell Congress to oppose the #BankLobbyistAct.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac45/bed43eb/5e0d23f0/75fe3ad4/774976198/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/stand-up-to-oligarch-stop-the-bank-lobbyist-act?source=em180319")
The nation's biggest banks are not confused about who this bill benefits, in fact, they sent a public thank you note to the Republicans and 14 Democrats in the Senate who support the bill. The Democrats supporting the bill are amongst the biggest recipients of contributions from Wall Street.
However, there is hope. The bill has not yet passed through reconciliation, so there is time for us to act. We can make all the Democrats in the Senate stand with Senators Warren and Sanders against Wall Street if we make our voices heard.
[**Tell your member of Congress to oppose the #BankLobbyistAct.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ac45/bed43eb/5e0d23f0/75fe3ad4/774976198/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/stand-up-to-oligarch-stop-the-bank-lobbyist-act?source=em180319")
Congress can either represent the millions of Americans struggling to put food on their table and keep up with their bills--or it can continue to be the legislature of Wall Street and the billionaire class. This is a moment for our elected officials to show whose side they are on.
At Our Revolution, we believe the American people must unite for a political revolution to transform our government and economy so that they belong to all of us.
Thank you for joining the fight!
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

Team Lipinski

name: Josh Earnest
subject: I am gravely concerned, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
The only way we're going to be able to hold the Trump administration accountable is by electing more Democrats.
---
Derek --

When I was press secretary for President Obama, my strategy was simple: I spoke directly with the president and didn't make a habit of lying to the American people.

You and I both know that's not how the Trump administration operates. Between the constant staff upheaval and drama, the rogue tweets, and overall failure to put the interests of the American people first, it's clear this administration is in utter chaos.

We can't control what happens in Trump's White House, but what we can do is turn our energy and attention towards electing Democrats determined to hold him accountable.

**I am asking you to be a part of that effort. Chip in $3 today to elect Democrats in all 50 states this year -- it's the only way we'll be able to cut through the noise and get our message directly to voters.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405226d7/4067b0a/511352ad1/7e48a85c/367756215/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-accountability?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180320_je_v2s3&source=em_20180320_je_v2s3&refcode=em_20180320_je_v2s3")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405226d7/4067b0a/511352ad1/7e48a85d/367756215/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-accountability?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180320_je_v2s3&source=em_20180320_je_v2s3&refcode=em_20180320_je_v2s3")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405226d7/4067b0a/511352ad1/7e48a85a/367756215/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-accountability?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180320_je_v2s3&source=em_20180320_je_v2s3&refcode=em_20180320_je_v2s3")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405226d7/4067b0a/511352ad1/7e48a85b/367756215/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-accountability?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180320_je_v2s3&source=em_20180320_je_v2s3&refcode=em_20180320_je_v2s3")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405226d7/4067b0a/511352ad1/7e48a858/367756215/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-accountability?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180320_je_v2s3&source=em_20180320_je_v2s3&refcode=em_20180320_je_v2s3")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405226d7/4067b0a/511352ad1/7e48a859/367756215/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trump-accountability?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180320_je_v2s3&source=em_20180320_je_v2s3&refcode=em_20180320_je_v2s3")
** When I stood behind the podium in the White House briefing room, I understood that I had a duty to President Obama -- and a duty to the American people.

The American people not only deserve a government that works on their behalf -- they also deserve one that does it with integrity and transparency.

I am deeply concerned that the Trump administration is doing lasting damage to the bond between the American people and their government -- and I can imagine you feel the same way.

November is our chance to do something about it. We have a real opportunity to create the blue wave everyone is talking about. But it will only happen if we invest in Democratic candidates running in tough elections and help them get their message directly to voters.

Thank you for your support. Your contribution will help Democrats win elections nationwide -- we can't do it without you.

**[Contribute $3 now to invest in Democrats who will stand up to Trump and his White House and hold them accountable.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405226d7/4067b0a/511352ad1/7e48a866/367756215/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/trump-accountability?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Contribute++if+consinConsGroup28497++set&utm_campaign=em_20180320_je_v2s3&source=em_20180320_je_v2s3&refcode=em_20180320_je_v2s3")**

Josh

Josh Earnest
Former White House Press Secretary

clean_body: The only way we're going to be able to hold the Trump administration accountable is by electing more Democrats. Derek -- When I was press secretary for President Obama, my strategy was simple: I spoke directly with the president and didn't make a habit of lying to the American people. You and I both know that's not how the Trump administration operates. Between the constant staff upheaval and drama, the rogue tweets, and overall failure to put the interests of the American people first, it's clear this administration is in utter chaos. We can't control what happens in Trump's White House, but what we can do is turn our energy and attention towards electing Democrats determined to hold him accountable. I am asking you to be a part of that effort. Chip in $3 today to elect Democrats in all 50 states this year -- it's the only way we'll be able to cut through the noise and get our message directly to voters. "" "" "" "" "" "" When I stood behind the podium in the White House briefing room, I understood that I had a duty to President Obama -- and a duty to the American people. The American people not only deserve a government that works on their behalf -- they also deserve one that does it with integrity and transparency. I am deeply concerned that the Trump administration is doing lasting damage to the bond between the American people and their government -- and I can imagine you feel the same way. November is our chance to do something about it. We have a real opportunity to create the blue wave everyone is talking about. But it will only happen if we invest in Democratic candidates running in tough elections and help them get their message directly to voters. Thank you for your support. Your contribution will help Democrats win elections nationwide -- we can't do it without you. "" Josh Josh Earnest Former White House Press Secretary Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. name: The White House
subject: Fighting the Crisis Next Door
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbb41ace21be823c7c2cd3b93e6bcf19722d56623e87e2538b1a6b224f8159eff047f84fdd705187803c788dadde3ca38b7d5c6018355996

Fighting the Crisis Next Door

Two million Americans suffer from addiction to prescription or illicit opioids. In 2017, opioids killed more people than either car accidents or gun violence.

Americans cannot let stigma, silence, or a lack of information prevent us from confronting this crisis. The Trump Administration is committed to leading that charge. Just as President Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbb41ace21be823c10a0478c36e059d4ada8122900914821641b43bb7e66dfdf4632ff4ad37352b3a934c1e30de07f8d49216d4bba9c97af
shared his personal story last October about his brother’s struggle with alcoholism, all Americans whose lives have been touched by opioid addiction deserve a place to tell their stories.

Now, they have one. “We're announcing a new website,
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbb41ace21be823cee6709ebe070a1350cc794ae9410487feaa2ae9586e1e2bf4457fe47a00bc9023575b10a941270cc26d0e3b4082b0e94
CrisisNextDoor.gov , where Americans can share their stories about the danger of the opioid addiction and addictions,” President Trump said yesterday in Manchester, New Hampshire. “This epidemic can affect anyone, and that's why we want to educate everyone.”

If you have an experience to share, you can record your story directly from your iPhone or upload a pre-recorded video. You may also watch what others have to say about confronting opioid addiction.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbb41ace21be823cee6709ebe070a1350cc794ae9410487feaa2ae9586e1e2bf4457fe47a00bc9023575b10a941270cc26d0e3b4082b0e94
Visit ‘The Crisis Next Door’ now to hear these voices—or to lend your own.

Restoring order to our immigration system

This afternoon, President Trump is hosting a roundtable discussion with law enforcement about sanctuary cities in the Roosevelt Room of the White House. During the past year, the President has made a priority of protecting Americans no matter where they live.

>From the earliest days of his Administration, President Trump made it clear he would not stand for lawlessness in the country’s immigration system. That attitude got results quickly: In February of last year, Miami-Dade County reversed its years-long sanctuary city policies. By August, the Administration determined that Miami-Dade County—Florida’s biggest—was now in compliance.

Furthermore, one of the President’s first Executive Orders informed sanctuary cities that failure to abide by Federal immigration laws would jeopardize their access to certain Federal grant money.

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbb41ace21be823cd9ea7c85c9505f9b82784e1ed1683c5ada0cc90766d5c7143c167c1d3d6c350d61c7c1a66ffb848668ecd31ee622be88
Facing the facts about our broken immigration system

A President that puts rural America front and center

Each U.S. farmer feeds more than 165 people—a dramatic increase from 25 people per farmer just a half-century ago, according to the Agriculture Council of America. Today is National Agriculture Day, or “Ag Day,” which offers an opportunity to reflect on the essential role agriculture plays in American life.

Throughout the past year, President Trump has made rural America a centerpiece of his Administration. In the President’s proposal for rebuilding America’s infrastructure, he has asked Congress to invest $50 billion in Federal funds for rural infrastructure.

“No doubt, rural America has struggled under burdensome regulations with no voice in Washington,” Secretary Perdue writes in the task force’s report. “Under President Trump’s leadership, and with the work of this task force, we can turn that around.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbb41ace21be823c0851b760a64a8b5d1f0a4dc574023f2443699cad4d81ccae3b94b8b530be63779499e5af0865af7c251cd791a8c3ae05
Read the President’s Ag Day Proclamation here.

Photo of the Day

President Trump delivers remarks on the Opioid Crisis | March 19, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will welcome Crown Prince Mohammad bin Salman of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia to the White House. The two will meet before having a working lunch along with Vice President Mike Pence.

This morning, the Vice President will deliver remarks at the U.S. Department of Agriculture commemorating the President’s National Agriculture Day Proclamation

This afternoon, the President and Vice President will host a law enforcement roundtable on sanctuary cities before attending the National Republican Congressional Committee March Dinner.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbb41ace21be823c65d5b45df44845ea60665be1b9a32c5b27b68bc4af707d524a002040ff601e44364a0f8c4806edb9ec34ac8c318bfe27
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cbb41ace21be823c59522e79bc2d8ab6ffc32a84cf4cee5d15be85e9ed1ceddee6307b4c4d1f418e7cf38e5c507b8e090a3f983591348720
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4f5ae830b2609a9d87f9899b2e76f077133b12e373cec1c2ac0f9b6491bdc1fc8e589e4c81c1504a715c3a14e93ba0de6704d45cfb1401843
Unsubscribe

name: John Kasich
subject: It happened again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
You missed it didn't you? On Thursday, the United States hit
another important milestone.

Peter, you missed it didn't
you?

On Thursday, the United States
hit another important milestone.

Our national debt officially
crossed $21 TRILLION and counting - and we're on pace to reach
$22 trillion in a year. We hit $20 trillion just last September
and $19 trillion in 2016!

Durham, N.H. Town Hall - 2/3/16

That is a staggering
mismanagement of our government and future generations of
Americans will pay dearly for the negligence of our elected
leaders!

Peter, our national debt isn't
making many news headlines these days, though it should. It is up
to you, me and citizens all over this country to demand that our
elected leaders in Washington wake up to not only the economic
risks of this but the geopolitical risks over borrowing endlessly
from China and other nations that may not share our values.

I did the best I could to raise
this issue during the 2016 campaign but we must ramp up our
efforts to draw attention to this critical issue. Can I count on
your support?

The funds we raise go directly
into the tools we use to carry this message and others that are
getting more and more attention every day. Please consider
chipping in whatever you can to help.

Thank you for all that you're
doing.

-John

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.

Hey --

Just last month, Governor Tom Wolf REJECTED Pennsylvania Republicans' gerrymandered map. Now Pennsylvania has new maps that are fair and represent the people.

_But Republicans are going to the Supreme Court to try to keep their gerrymandered maps in place!_

Look, Republicans will go to any level to suppress the right to vote. Gerrymandering is just one way that they are trying to rig elections in their favor.

We're fighting back to make our elections fair and to protect the right to vote. And we want to hear from you in the process!
**[Click here to share your thoughts in our new Voting Rights Survey >>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfbd/73a2bc12/3f9b1ca5/1fccf45a/2568760476/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/voting-rights-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180320_voting_clk_clq_ns_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=&source=em18_180320_voting_clk_clq_ns_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=6+-+Click+here+to+share+your+thoughts+in+our")**

Governor Tom Wolf knows that the right to vote is essential to our democracy.

That's why he's enacted online voter registration -- and it's why he's fighting to make voting even easier by pushing for automatic voter registration and same day voter registration.

_But Republicans have abused the system for decades to shut out voters from our democratic process._

They've gerrymandered districts, passed strict voter ID laws, and closed down polling locations. Their voter suppression tactics must be stopped.

| Peter, President Trump has nominated Chai Feldblum for another five-year term as a member of the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission; a federal agency created by the Civil Rights Act of 1964 to combat workplace discrimination. Feldblum was first nominated by the Obama Administration in 2010 to serve on the five-member person commission. **Why is this a problem?** **Feldblum aggressively advocates for supremacy of LGBT rights over religious liberty.** She endorses polygamy and believes the institution of marriage offers no value to society. Feldblum has declared, “There can be conflict between religious liberty and sexual liberty, but in almost all cases the sexual liberty should win because that’s the only way that the dignity of gay people can be affirmed in any realistic manner.”

**If Feldblum keeps her post as Commissioner for yet another five years, there will be a definitive, devastating shift in the EEOC’s application of discrimination laws regarding Christians in the workplace who genuinely desire to practice their faith.**

As Senator Mike Lee points out in the Daily Signal, “Feldblum believes her radical agenda ‘cannot be adequately advanced if pockets of resistance ... are permitted to flourish.’ She therefore has argued that ‘no individual exceptions based on religious beliefs’ should ever be allowed if they conflict with ‘the goal of liberty for gay people.’” These statements from Ms. Feldblum should serve as a grave warning signal to Christians in America that religious liberty is threatened with Feldblum’s nomination. I hope I can count on you to take a stand on this important issue. **United. We Stand.**

Jason Yates

name: Team Kaine
subject: We want to hear from you about offshore drilling >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
A lot's been happening with offshore drilling. Here's the short of it:

First, Trump announced that he would be expanding offshore drilling anywhere and everywhere - a move that would negatively affect countless communities and threaten Virginia's coastal tourism and naval operations in Hampton Roads. (It's also completely unnecessary, but that's a whole other email.)

Then, after the Governor of Florida spoke up, Secretary of the Interior Ryan Zinke announced that there would be no drilling off the coast of Florida. As Zinke said, "local voice matters" - and he had heard loud and clear that offshore drilling would be bad for Florida.

**Sure, that seems right. But what about other coastal states - like, say, Virginia? Both Terry McAuliffe and Ralph Northam have spoken up, too, and we have yet to hear of any exemptions for the Commonwealth. So it begs the question: Why exactly is Florida the exception here?
**
Could it possibly be that the Mar-a-Lago resort would be negatively impacted? (Or the "Winter White House" as some call it...) Could it be because the Governor of Florida is a Republican, while Virginia's leaders are Democrats? Could it be that Florida is a key state that the Republican administration is eager to have on its side? **No matter which way you cut it, as a recent Washington Post editorial put it, excluding Florida "sure looks partisan."**

**So here's what we need from you: If Secretary Zinke is determined to listen to local voices, we must speak up.[Will you fill out this quick, one-minute survey to share your opinion on the recent offshore drilling news?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pMYSzSxSJTFkbbo69VFo4gg5F00ZbXho)**

Thanks - we really appreciate your input.

-Team Kaine

name: Dr. Stephanie Kelton, The Sanders Institute
subject: Federal Job Guarantee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
#
_**" The test of our progress is not whether we add to the abundance of those who have much; it is whether we provide enough for those who have too little." --FDR**_
Dear Friend,
In 1933, President Roosevelt launched a series of public programs aimed at helping Americans recover from the Great Depression. The right to a job was his first policy item in his _Second Bill of Rights._
Then in 1967, a group of core organizers of the historic March on Washington for Jobs and Freedom introduced the _Freedom Budget for All Americans._ This program was the blueprint for achieving Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s "I Have A Dream" speech, and also called for a national employment guarantee as a way to eradicate poverty within ten years.
In 2007, the Great Recession began and, despite the prevailing narrative of our economy being at full employment, we have still not recovered from it. There are still millions of people who are underemployed or discouraged from looking for work, and an estimated 43 million Americans still live in poverty.
It is time to take a fresh look at the policies and ideas that could help all of our people to recover, not just the very wealthy. It's time to seriously consider the country's need for a National Jobs Program.
[**I recently sat down with Dr. Jane O'Meara Sanders to talk about how a National Job Guarantee Program for the 21st century might work.**](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7ac43/bed43eb/5d1475f3/75fe45c7/3828140529/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/") Over the past year, I have been working with a team of economists to create a full report on the costs, benefits, and projections of such a program.
Our proposal, which will be released next month, will fulfill the goals outlined in FDR and MLK's visionary programs by employing an estimated 14-19 million people, and will almost completely pay for itself.
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7ac43/bed43eb/5d1475f3/75fe45c7/3828140529/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/")
This is a bottom-up program, designed to shrink the existing levels of income and wealth inequality and guarantee a fundamental right to employment for anyone willing and able to work.
Government at its best can be used to increase the health of the individual and society itself. We can transform America with a federal job guarantee, caring for our people, our planet, and our communities.
Thank you for staying engaged,
Dr. Stephanie Kelton
Founding Fellow at The Sanders Institute
**[DONATE»](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7ac43/bed43eb/5d1475f3/75fe45c6/3828140529/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em180320")**
Additional Resources For Further Reading:
[FDR's Second Bill of Rights](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7ac43/bed43eb/5d1475f3/75fe45c1/3828140529/VEsC/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/fdrs-second-bill-of-rights")
[A Freedom Budget For All Americans](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7ac43/bed43eb/5d1475f3/75fe45c0/3828140529/VEsD/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/a-freedom-budget-for-all-americans")

body:
Team,

We knew the liberal media would attack us, as they always have and always will. But we also knew that good people would stand up for us, ask hard questions, and tell the truth. And they have.

This past week, the Chief of the St. Louis Police, John Hayden, demanded answers from Circuit Attorney Kim Gardner. As he put it to the St. Louis Post Dispatch (http://www.stltoday.com/news/local/crime-and-courts/man-investigating-greitens-affair-was-himself-investigated-by-the-fbi/article_fd9ad552-57f7-5725-839d-5aa64432925a.html?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=e571c32881-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_03_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-e571c32881-99442473&utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=fc2d100d5c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_03_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-fc2d100d5c-99411629) , "This has all been oddly done to me as far as I’m concerned. She has to explain why she did what she did.”

At the Federalist, Lt. Col. David Grossman, a nationally-recognized leader in law enforcement, asked five powerful and troublesome questions (http://thefederalist.com/2018/03/08/five-questions-on-the-eric-greitens-indictment-that-must-be-answered/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=fc2d100d5c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_03_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-fc2d100d5c-99411629) about the indictment that cast doubt on the whole case. The piece has been widely-read--and with good reason.

http://thefederalist.com/2018/03/08/five-questions-on-the-eric-greitens-indictment-that-must-be-answered/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=fc2d100d5c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_03_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-fc2d100d5c-99411629

At Townhall, Armstrong Williams expressed the opinion of many, who see what's going on in this case and can't stand it: Here's what a modern political witch hunt looks like (https://townhall.com/columnists/armstrongwilliams/2018/03/14/heres-what-a-modern-political-witch-hunt-looks-like-n2460805?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=fc2d100d5c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_03_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-fc2d100d5c-99411629) . And Steven Hantler asked a question on a lot of people's minds: what's behind the Kim Gardner indictment? Answer: George Soros and an anti-law enforcement agenda. (http://www.breitbart.com/big-government/2018/02/25/hantler-george-soros-declares-war-state-missouri/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=fc2d100d5c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_03_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-fc2d100d5c-99411629)

And even while the liberal media has been providing endless, breathless coverage of a case with no merits, the Governor and his team have been hard at work doing what they said they would do: fighting for the people of Missouri.

When the Governor took office, he promised to bring more jobs to Missouri. In the last week alone, he delivered: 2,000 quality jobs are coming back to Missouri. Here is a video (https://www.facebook.com/EricGreitens/videos/10156264764489747/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=fc2d100d5c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_03_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-fc2d100d5c-99411629) of the Governor announcing 450 jobs at an aluminum smelter in New Madrid.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: A record to be proud of.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Washington state shows how to get things done. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79ca3/2f5ea88d/732008d2/2cbc92de/3922233502/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legislative-wrap-up?utm_source=ema_2018-03-20_legislative-accomplishments&refcode=ema_2018-03-20_legislative-accomplishments&utm_campaign=legislative-accomplishments&utm_medium=ema") Friend, We have a lot to be proud of for all we accomplished during this year's legislative session. Just yesterday, I signed a suite of voter access bills that will make our democracy healthier and more vibrant, including same-day voter registration, automatic voter registration, and a new _Voting Rights Act_. We passed a $4 billion capital construction budget. Equal pay for women. A ban on bump stocks for assault weapons. The _Reproductive Parity Act_. _The other Washington can learn a lot from us about getting things done._ While President Trump thrives on chaos and conflict, we spent the past months laser-focused on passing legislation that tackles some of our state's biggest challenges. **The result? Big wins across the board for Washington families. We showed that, with the right leadership, we can achieve real solutions.** [**Will you chip in to let me know you support the work we did this legislative session? I need the tools to keep fighting for progressive policies like these in WA and across the country.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79ca3/2f5ea88d/732008d2/2cbc92de/3922233502/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legislative-wrap-up?utm_source=ema_2018-03-20_legislative-accomplishments&refcode=ema_2018-03-20_legislative-accomplishments&utm_campaign=legislative-accomplishments&utm_medium=ema") Washingtonians in every part of the state are better off, thanks to this legislative session:
* We banned so-called 'conversion therapy' for LGBTQ adolescents
* We ensured net neutrality will continue in the state of Washington, regardless of the chaos and dysfunction from DC
* We made it easier for schools to provide nutritional breakfasts to students
* We put a stop to rental housing discrimination based on income

The accomplishments coming out of this legislative session make it clear: Fighting for our progressive values even in the face of powerful special interests can pay off for real improvements that will make a difference in people's lives. [**Will you let me know we're standing together after this legislative session? I want to keep fighting for our shared progressive values.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79ca3/2f5ea88d/732008d2/2cbc92de/3922233502/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legislative-wrap-up?utm_source=ema_2018-03-20_legislative-accomplishments&refcode=ema_2018-03-20_legislative-accomplishments&utm_campaign=legislative-accomplishments&utm_medium=ema") Make no mistake, the fight continues and we must redouble our efforts to protect our climate, ensure gun safety for our communities, and continue the hard work of building a more equitable economy. So your support now, helping us build on the momentum we found this session, couldn't be more important. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79ca3/2f5ea88d/732008d2/2cbc92de/3922233502/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legislative-wrap-up?utm_source=ema_2018-03-20_legislative-accomplishments&refcode=ema_2018-03-20_legislative-accomplishments&utm_campaign=legislative-accomplishments&utm_medium=ema")

Hi there,
Trump's Secretary of Education, Betsy DeVos, recently stumbled her way through an interview with _CBS_ 's "_60 Minutes_ ," struggling to answer basic questions about our nation's schools.
She was unable defend her reckless attempts to slash funding for public education, and she admitted that she hasn't even visited underperforming schools to assess what support they need.
**DeVos's policies are bad for our students and teachers, and it 's up to us to hold her accountable. [Please sign our petition to call on Betsy DeVos to do her job and protect funding for public education.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf3a/2a380d31/59199f2/f1e3c1/1873035051/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180319_HoldDeVosAccountable?source=e20180320_DeVos60min_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
In her first year, DeVos hasn't just undermined our public education system. She has failed to stand up against discrimination and sexual harassment in our education system, and blocked policies that could help make student loan debt more manageable.
Her priorities are out of line and our students, teachers, and public schools will pay the price.
**Senator Hassan believes that our public schools can best serve our students when we invest in their success instead of making drastic cuts and shifting funds to private, religious, and for-profit schools that only serve a select few.**
[**Please add your name to stand with Senator Hassan in the fight to secure funding for public schools and protect our nation 's students from Betsy DeVos's out-of-touch agenda.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf3a/2a380d31/59199f2/f1e3c1/1873035051/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180319_HoldDeVosAccountable?source=e20180320_DeVos60min_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")

body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [**BREAKING: Pennsylvania Republican House Members Move to IMPEACH Court Judges Over Gerrymandering**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecfa8/73a2bc12/3f91547a/1fccea44/2499856440/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-gerrymandering-impeach?utm_campaign=em18_180320_impeach_fnd_clq_act_ger_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180320_impeach_fnd_clq_act_ger_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=auto&amount=25&utm_content=1+-+BREAKING+Pennsylvania+Republican+House+M") Yesterday, Republicans lost their latest desperate attempt to block Pennsylvania's new, fair maps when the U.S. Supreme Court rejected their efforts.

Now, with nowhere left to fight in the courts, they're launching another last-ditch effort to rig the system.

Friends,

North Carolina is a purple state -- we're mostly fifty-fifty.

But when it comes to our legislature and our congressional delegation, it's not even close. Republicans have supermajorities in the North Carolina House and Senate. In Congress, we're represented by 10 Republicans and just three Democrats.

This gerrymandering has to end. The rigging of our system has to end.

**I'm teaming up with Governors Jay Inslee and Kate Brown and many others in Congress to fight against gerrymandering.[Add your name NOW to help restore our democracy and end gerrymandering.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12037e1/2fde7c66/47eadc98/1569ddbc/2504158440/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymanderingnow/?code=Cooper&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F180320-cooper-gerrymandering-thanks%23&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+NOW+to+help+restore+our+de&utm_campaign=em18_180320_gerryJA_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em18_180320_gerryJA_adv_gq_ful__rc")**

Using new map-making software, Republican leaders in the North Carolina legislature and all across the country have rigged the system.

It's getting out of hand, friend, and we need to put a stop to it.

[**In order to have free and fair elections, we need to get rid of gerrymandering. Add your name to join the grassroots movement that's fighting against it.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12037e1/2fde7c66/47eadc98/1569ddbf/2504158440/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymanderingnow/?code=Cooper&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F180320-cooper-gerrymandering-thanks%23&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-+In+order+to+have+free+and+fair+elections&utm_campaign=em18_180320_gerryJA_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em18_180320_gerryJA_adv_gq_ful__rc")

Thanks for all you continue to do,

Roy
